message:
feat(command): HGETEX + HGETDEL (br-frankenredis-t2nh, rv89 part 4c)

Implements the remaining Redis 7.4 hash field TTL commands in fr-command:

  HGETEX key [EX s | PX ms | EXAT unix-s | PXAT unix-ms | PERSIST] FIELDS n field ...
  HGETDEL key FIELDS n field ...

Both return an array of bulk-strings (value per field, or nil for missing
/ just-reaped fields). HGETEX's optional TTL modifier sets the per-field
TTL for every requested field after the read (via the
hash_field_set_abs_expiry_with_event / hash_field_persist_with_event
paths landed in 7jhg). HGETDEL deletes the fields after the read; HDEL's
cleanup hook clears per-field TTL entries automatically
(br-frankenredis-b8ut).

CommandId enum + classifier length-buckets + is_write_command matrix
updated:
  - HGETEX: length 6 bucket, primary classifier, is_write when a
    TTL-modifying modifier is present; accepted as write unconditionally
    for simplicity so AOF propagation stays correct.
  - HGETDEL: length 7 bucket, primary classifier, is_write (mutating).

6 new fr-command tests:
  - hgetex_plain_returns_values_without_modifying_ttls
  - hgetex_ex_sets_field_ttl_while_reading
  - hgetex_persist_drops_existing_ttl
  - hgetdel_returns_values_and_removes_fields
  - hgetex_rejects_unknown_modifier (→ SyntaxError)
  - hgetdel_wrongtype_surfaces_upstream_error

fr-command 625/0; workspace clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
